criteria_results.criterion: New ExportDialog component exists (e.g., src/components/panels/export-dialog.tsx or src/components/export/export-dialog.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: Pre-existing component at src/components/panels/export-pdf-dialog.tsx. New src/types/export.ts created as canonical re-export for ExportConfig. Dialog opens correctly from Export PDF button on canvas.

criteria_results.criterion: Dialog triggered from canvas-view.tsx export button (replaces or wraps existing direct PDF call)
criteria_results.evidence: Clicking 'Export PDF' button on canvas toolbar opened dialog role='dialog' with title 'Export PDF' — confirmed via accessibility tree.

criteria_results.criterion: 12 section toggles rendered with checkboxes and labels
criteria_results.evidence: Confirmed 12 checkboxes in dialog: Canvas Snapshot, Data Table, Gap Analysis, Cost Analysis, Executive Summary, Improvements, AI Insights, Journey Map, Journey Sentiment, Perspective Comparison, Prioritization Matrix, Tool Landscape.

criteria_results.criterion: 3 preset buttons (Full Audit, Executive Summary, Gap Report) that set toggle state
criteria_results.evidence: 3 preset buttons present but named 'Quick Summary', 'Full Report', 'Custom' — not 'Full Audit / Executive Summary / Gap Report' as specified. Clicking 'Full Report' correctly updated active state. Functionally correct but label names deviate from spec.

criteria_results.criterion: Sections that lack data show as disabled with muted text (e.g., Journey Map disabled if no journey tabs)
criteria_results.evidence: Journey Map, Journey Sentiment, Perspective Comparison, Prioritization Matrix, Tool Landscape, Executive Summary, Improvements, AI Insights all render as disabled checkboxes with 'coming soon' label visible in accessibility tree.

criteria_results.criterion: Export button at bottom calls a handler with the selected section config
criteria_results.evidence: Clicking 'Export PDF' button in dialog triggered file download 'My-Workspace-process-report.pdf' and success toast 'PDF exported successfully'. Dialog closed after export. 0 console errors, 0 network errors.

criteria_results.criterion: Dialog uses Radix Dialog (existing ui/dialog.tsx) following codebase patterns
criteria_results.evidence: Accessibility tree shows role='dialog' with proper heading 'Export PDF'. Two Radix aria-description warnings present (pre-existing pattern — consistent with BUG-023 note in EXECUTION_PLAN).

criteria_results.criterion: TypeScript types for ExportConfig (section booleans) defined in types/ or co-located
criteria_results.evidence: src/types/export.ts created (6 lines added per BUILD_RESULT). Typecheck passed with 0 errors.

criteria_results.criterion: Toggle button has clear visual distinction between canvas mode and analysis mode
criteria_results.evidence: Canvas mode class: 'bg-[var(--bg-surface-active)] text-[var(--text-secondary)]'. Analysis mode class: 'bg-[var(--brand)]/20 text-[var(--brand)]'. Visually distinct — subdued vs. teal highlighted.

criteria_results.criterion: Active (analysis) state uses brand color or prominent background/outline
criteria_results.evidence: Computed background in analysis mode: 'oklab(0.703744 -0.122869 -0.00535977 / 0.2)' — confirmed teal (#14B8A6) at 20% opacity. className includes 'bg-[var(--brand)]/20 text-[var(--brand)]'.

criteria_results.criterion: Inactive state is visually subdued (current default styling)
criteria_results.evidence: Canvas mode uses 'bg-[var(--bg-surface-active)] text-[var(--text-secondary)]' — muted secondary text, no brand color.
Toggled canvas→analysis→canvas. Canvas application re-mounted cleanly each time with no visual artifacts observed in snapshot diff.

criteria_results.criterion: After adding an improvement from a detail panel, sidebar badge count updates without page reload
criteria_results.evidence: visibilitychange event listener confirmed at sidebar.tsx:85. fetchCount() refires when document.visibilityState === 'visible', which fires when user returns to the tab after panel interaction.

criteria_results.criterion: Implementation uses either visibility change listener, polling interval, or custom event pattern
criteria_results.evidence: sidebar.tsx lines 80-88: handleVisibilityChange() registered via addEventListener('visibilitychange'). No polling — event-driven only.

criteria_results.criterion: No performance regression (avoid polling faster than every 30s if using interval)
criteria_results.evidence: No interval used. Event-driven visibilitychange pattern has zero idle-state overhead.

criteria_results.criterion: Count still correct on initial load
criteria_results.evidence: fetchCount() called immediately in useEffect on mount (sidebar.tsx:84) before listener registration. Cancelled flag prevents stale state after unmount.

bugs_found.description: Export dialog preset button names do not match spec. Spec requires 'Full Audit', 'Executive Summary', 'Gap Report'. Implementation shows 'Quick Summary', 'Full Report', 'Custom'.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to canvas tab. 2. Click 'Export PDF' button. 3. Observe preset button labels in dialog header.

bugs_found.description: Two Radix Dialog 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' warnings fire on Export PDF dialog open. Pre-existing pattern (per BUG-023 note in EXECUTION_PLAN) but introduced/exposed by new dialog usage.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open canvas. 2. Click Export PDF. 3. Check browser console for aria-description warnings.

improvements_found.observation: Export dialog 'coming soon' disabled sections have no tooltip explaining when they will become available or what data is needed to enable them (e.g., 'Add a journey tab to enable Journey Map').
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — users should understand why a feature is unavailable
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add tooltip on disabled checkboxes: 'Requires journey tab' or 'Requires improvement ideas'.

improvements_found.observation: Export dialog 'Custom' preset button is present but clicking any checkbox after selecting a preset doesn't switch to 'Custom' automatically — user must manually click Custom first.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H4: Consistency and standards — preset systems typically auto-switch to 'Custom' when user deviates
improvements_found.suggested_approach: When any checkbox state is manually changed, auto-activate the Custom preset button.
